name: Freezer Sweet and Sour Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, ginger, pork and oil.
2. Brown slowly, stirring to brown evenly.
3. Mix together sauce ingredients and add to meat mixture. Cook until done.
4. Add pineapple chunks, green pepper, bean sprouts, water chestnuts, and chili sauce.
5. Heat through.
6. Serve with 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 cups cooked rice.
